evidences.label: Audio

evidences.label: EMF 20+
evidences.desc: When it lights up until red/it's 20+, it is considered evidence.

evidences.label: Freezing Temperatures
evidences.desc: Temperatures are only considered freezing evidence if they are below 00.00 Celsius/32 Fahrenheit.

evidences.label: Radiation
evidences.desc: Any tick moved (analog) or peak value over 55 (digital) is considered evidence.

evidences.label: UV
evidences.desc: When you shine a UV light on recently touched light switches, touched doors (not slammed), moved chairs (floor), evidence will count if you see a fluorescent spray/puddle

evidences.label: Writing
evidences.desc: Will be evidence if the ghost draws/writes on the Blank Book/Drawing Easel.
